sources.cleaned_content:
Upside down sprayer MULTI TR MINI 360

The bottle sprayer IK MULTI TR MINI 360 offers a professional spraying solution for optimum results in a wide range of sectors such as cleaning and disinfection, automotive and vehicle detailing, bike cleaning, virus, pest and epidemic control, DIY or industrial applications and air conditioning (HVAC).
This sprayer is ideal for isolated works on small surfaces.
360º system to spray in all positions upside down spraying.
Only dilute acids (max 5%).

- 360º system to spray in all positions upside down spraying

IK MULTI TR MINI 360 all purpose cleaner:
The IK Multi TR MINI 360 sprayer is the ideal tool for any cleaning and disinfection work, optimal for spraying a wide variety of chemicals such as disinfectants, neutral products, alcohols, alkaline products and ketones.
The IK Multi TR MINI 360 is a light and handy trigger sprayer that incorporates a base for greater stability, a colour-coded content identification system and a translucent tank that allows to check the level of liquid inside.

Sprayer type: Handheld sprayers, Water sprayers, 1-2 litre sprayers

sources.page_title: IK MUTLI TR 1 360° | IK Car Detailing Anyway Up Trigger Sprayer
sources.cleaned_content:
IK MULTI TR 1 360° Trigger Sprayer

Brand: IK Sprayers
Product code: 84177
Selected Type: Trigger Sprayer
Price: £13.45
In Stock

Product Images:
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/18338-700-700/ik-multi-tr-1-360-c2-b0.png
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/18339-700-700/ik-multi-tr-1-360-c2-b0.png
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/18340-700-700/ik-multi-tr-1-360-c2-b0.png
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/18341-700-700/ik-multi-tr-1-360-c2-b0.png

Multi Purpose 1 Litre Sprayer

IK MULTI TR 1 Spray Bottle is great for a wide range of sectors such as cleaning and disinfection, automotive and vehicle detailing, DIY or industrial applications and air conditioning (HVAC). Now featuring 360° spraying even when upside down.

With such a versatile spray bottle all detailing jobs can be done with ease. Even jobs that may have been more difficult in the past, especially those requiring the sprayer to be upside down for wheel arches or interior hood linings the IK Multi TR 1 will be able to hand the complexity. The adjustable conical nozzle gives for greater accuracy between a fine mist and jet settings; pair that with the ergonomic handle design, for comfortable use, and this trigger spray mixing bottle is a favourite amongst detailers. IK Sprayers haven't stopped there the IK Multi 1 also comes with a translucent design with products indicators, so you know how much is product you have left.

The wide base and content identifying label gives you confidence in putting the product down when in use and picking up the correct spray bottle from the cupboard without hunting around every time.

Features:
- Nozzles - Adjustable Conical Nozzle
- 360° spray, even upside down
- Useful capacity - 1 Litre
- Total capacity - 1 Litre
- Gross weight - 0.18 Kg
- Net weight - 0.18 Kg

How To Use:
- Depressurise and cleaner after each use.
- Dispose of chemicals according to legislation & regulations.
- If the nozzle is blocked clean with water and do not use metal objects.
- If the filter is blocked clean it with water.
- Store the sprayer indoors and avoid temperatures about or below 5-30°C.
- Apply grease to moving parts and seals regularly.

Documents:
- IK Sprayer Chemical Table: https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/documents/IK-Sprayer-Chemical-Table.pdf
- IK Sprayer Instruction Booklet: https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/documents/IK-Instruction-Booklets/84170-INS.pdf
- IK Sprayer Catalogue: https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/documents/IK-Instruction-Booklets/84170-CAT.pdf

sources.page_title: iK Multi TR 1 360 | The Rag Company
sources.cleaned_content:
iK Multi TR 1 360

Sale price: $18.00
Rating: 4.8 out of 5 stars (12 Reviews)

Product Images:
- https://theragcompany.com/cdn/shop/files/ik-multi-tr-360-main-web_f2f843a3-89c6-46ea-81e7-ff4903eeb025.jpg?v=1762198593&width=600
- https://theragcompany.com/cdn/shop/files/ik-multi-tr-360-main-web.jpg?v=1700602424&width=600
- https://theragcompany.com/cdn/shop/files/ik-multi-tr-360-back-web.jpg?v=1700602424&width=600

The iK Multi TR 1 360 is a high-performance, professional-grade sprayer designed for optimal results across a variety of applications, including cleaning and disinfection, automotive and bike detailing, virus and pest control, and light industrial use. Its 360° functionality allows for efficient spraying at any angle, making it ideal for precision tasks on small or hard-to-reach surfaces.

Engineered for professional use, the TR 1 360 is built to handle even the most aggressive chemicals with maximum safety, durability, and ease of use.

Key Features:
- 360° Spray System – Allows spraying from any position or angle, even upside down
- Stable Base Design – Enhanced stability during use and refill
- 1-Liter Translucent Tank (35oz) – Durable container with clear level indicators for easy monitoring
- Chemical Identification System – Includes interchangeable color tags for quick and easy content identification

Cleaning & Maintenance Guidelines:
- Always depressurize the sprayer and rinse thoroughly with clean water after each use.
- Properly dispose of any remaining chemical residue in accordance with local regulations.
- If the nozzle becomes clogged, flush it with water only—do not use metal objects to clear obstructions.
- For blocked handle filters, remove and rinse with clean water.
- Store in a sheltered environment, avoiding exposure to freezing temperatures or excessive heat (ideal range: 5°C to 30°C).
- To extend seal life, apply a light grease to all moving parts regularly.

Safety Information:
- Always follow the instructions and recommended dosages found on the chemical product’s packaging.
- Do not smoke, eat, or drink while preparing or spraying chemicals to avoid accidental ingestion.
- Never spray toward people, animals, electrical devices, open flames, or any ignition source.
- Always wear appropriate protective gear, including gloves, goggles, masks, and protective footwear, to minimize chemical exposure.
- Carefully read the sprayer’s user manual before use. Do not modify the unit or tamper with safety mechanisms like the pressure relief valve.

Chemical Compatibility:
- Optimal: Disinfectants, neutral products, alcohols, alkalis, ketones
- Limited Use: Diluted acids (up to 5%), solvents (hydrocarbons), petroleum derivatives

Video: https://img.youtube.com/vi/WNu-qCu2OPI/maxresdefault.jpg

Customer Reviews (12 reviews, 4.8/5 stars, 100% would recommend):

Efrain F. (Verified Buyer) - 5/5 stars - "Sprayer - Best sprayer on the market"

BOBBY P. (Verified Buyer) - 5/5 stars - "Nice - My new go to"

Javier A. B. (Verified Buyer) - 4/5 stars - "Beautiful but.... That sprayer is great, weight, functionality, portion of chemicals, but the tips are too delicate on many occasions"

Walter A. (Verified Buyer) - 5/5 stars - "Spray bottle - Love the trigger, works well"

sources.page_title: iK Multi TR Mini 360 Sprayer 600ml | CARDETAIL
sources.cleaned_content:
iK Multi TR Mini 360 Sprayer 600ml

Brand: IK Sprayers
Price: €13,75

Product Image:
- https://www.cardetail.be/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/ik-multi-tr-mini-360-web-1.jpg

Key highlights:
- Professional, small spray bottle
- Suitable for virtually all liquids
- Specially developed for detailing
- 360 degree function

Shipping: Ordered before 5 p.m., shipped the same business day. Free shipping from €50 (BE & NL). Fast delivery in Europe.

Category: Verstuivers & Flessen

Description:

iK Multi TR Mini 360 Sprayer

The iK Multi TR Mini 360 offers a professional spray bottle suitable for virtually all of your favorite detailing products. The iK sprayer features a 360° feature that allows you to use the spray bottle in all positions upside down. Super convenient when working on small spaces or hard to reach areas (think wheel wells for example). The iK Mini Sprayer is a handy spray bottle that can be used for all your car detailing work. Moreover, the bottle is made of very sturdy HDPE material with a wide base for more stability so the bottle is less likely to fall over.

Features iK Multi TR Mini 360:
- Professional, small spray bottle
- 360 degree function to spray in all positions upside down
- Ideal for use in small spaces
- Provision for own label
- Specially developed for detailing
- Suitable for virtually all liquids and products
- Limited resistance to acids
- Capacity: 600 ml / 0.6 liter

This spray bottle is not suitable for use with solvents (such as tar removers). For this we recommend the use of the iK HC TR 1.

Additional information:
| Brand | IK Sprayers |

IK Multi TR Mini 360 Heavy Duty Sprayer 20 oz

Product Images:
- https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-e27d9/images/stencil/1280x1280/products/2016/8799/Screen_Shot_2023-11-17_at_2.48.36_PM__59380.1700250530.png?c=2
- https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-e27d9/images/stencil/1280x1280/products/2016/7949/Screen_Shot_2022-12-13_at_1.36.46_PM__62824.1670957359.png?c=2
- https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-e27d9/images/stencil/1280x1280/products/2016/7951/84173-1__49708.1670957227.jpg?c=2

Description:

The IK Multi TR MINI 360 sprayer is the ideal tool for any cleaning and disinfection work, optimal for spraying a wide variety of chemicals such as all purpose cleaners, disinfectants, neutral chemicals, lightly concentrated acids (maximum 5%), and low-alkaline solutions (up to pH 11). The IK Multi TR MINI 360 is a light and handy trigger sprayer that incorporates a base for greater stability, a color-coded content identification system and a translucent tank that allows to check the level of liquid inside. This sprayer is ideal for isolated work on small surfaces. Has the ability to spray in all positions including upside down spraying thanks to it's 360 system.

Features:
- Adjustable spray nozzle.
- 360 system that allows spraying in all positions.
- Strong translucent tank with level indicator.
- Content identifying system.
- Easy assembly and taking apart for cleaning and maintenance, tool free.
- Optimal for all purpose cleaners, disinfectants, neutral products, alcohols, alkalis and ketones. Partially resistant to acids (Chemical Product Table: https://www.iksprayers.com/en/chemical-product-table).

Specifications:
- Net weight: 0.39 lb
- Gross weight: 0.39 lb
- Total capacity: 20 oz (0.6 L)

Cleaning and Maintenance of the Sprayer:
- After each use depressurize the sprayer and clean it.
- If the nozzle becomes blocked, clean it with water and do not use metallic objects.
- If the filter of the handle is clogged, remove it and clean it with water.
- Store the sprayer under cover, avoiding freezing temperatures and extreme heat (between 5 and 30 C).
- To prolong the life of the seals, regularly apply grease to the moving parts of the sprayer.

Video: IK Trigger Sprayers (en) - Discover the new IK Multi, HC and upside down trigger sprayers...
